name: Gold N Stones II Pawn Shop
description_short: Gold N Stones II is a pawn shop in Mount Clemens, Michigan offering collateral-based loans, jewelry sales, and used merchandise including electronics, tools, and gaming equipment.
description_long:
Gold N Stones operates two locations in Macomb County, Michigan, with Gold N Stones II located at 177 Northbound Gratiot in Mount Clemens. The company positions itself as more than a traditional pawn lender, emphasizing retail operations alongside their core pawn loan business. According to their website, they have been serving the local community and maintain licensed, trained employees dedicated to customer service.

Gold N Stones II offers pawn loans on customer valuables as their primary financial service. They also operate a retail storefront selling a wide range of used merchandise, including televisions, computers, jewelry, power tools, video games, Apple products, bicycles, and lawn equipment. The company claims to pay competitive rates for items and provides fast, convenient loans to customers who need cash during difficult times or for extra spending money.

The company distinguishes itself by combining pawn lending with legitimate retail operations rather than functioning exclusively as a loan provider. They actively use social media and eBay to market inventory, offer internet-only promotions, and maintain an online presence. Their mission statement explicitly emphasizes paying top dollar for valuables, providing excellent customer service, and offering safe, convenient loans.

Limitations include the website being dated (last updated January 2013) with acknowledged development issues, which raises questions about current operations and reliability. As a pawn shop, this service model requires customers to part with physical collateral and involves typical pawn industry dynamics including itemization, valuation, and redemption periods. The company's retail focus means they are not a primary resource for personal loans or credit-building products.
address: 177 Northbound Gratiot Ave, Mt Clemens, MI 48043

company_info.headquarters: 177 Northbound Gratiot Ave, Mt Clemens, MI 48043

pros: Two convenient Mount Clemens locations with extended hours (some days until 7pm)
Licensed and trained employees available to assess and process pawn transactions
Retail storefront allows customers to shop for used merchandise alongside pawn services
Claims to pay competitive rates for valuables and jewelry
Wide range of accepted items including electronics, tools, jewelry, and gaming equipment
Active social media presence and eBay listings for inventory visibility
Mission-driven approach emphasizing fair loans and customer service
cons: Website last updated January 2013 with acknowledged ongoing development issues, suggesting outdated online presence
No current pricing, interest rates, or loan terms published on website
Pawn model requires surrendering physical collateral with risk of item loss if loan not repaid
Limited information about loan approval process, redemption periods, or specific fees
No evidence of online application or remote transaction capability
best_for: Local Mount Clemens residents needing quick cash against valuable collateral
Individuals seeking to purchase discounted used electronics, tools, or jewelry
People with valuable items they're willing to pledge for short-term loans
diagnosis: Gold N Stones II is best for Macomb County residents with valuable items they can pledge for immediate cash during financial emergencies or those seeking discounted used merchandise. The primary caveat is the outdated website and lack of published loan terms, rates, or clear process information, requiring customers to visit in-person to understand specific loan offerings and conditions.
services: Pawn loans on personal valuables and jewelry
Video game and gaming system sales
Social media and eBay sales channels
